general_notes: Do not choose the immobiliser procedure from registration year alone.
Identify the fitted instrument cluster or dashboard family before Add Key or AKL work.
Keep keyed and KESSY variants separate during diagnosis and quoting.
Confirm the blade physically before cutting, especially during the HU66 to HU162T transition.
Dealer-key preparation requirements depend on immobiliser family, fitted module and chosen tool.
Generation tools do not automatically provide vehicle programming or AKL coverage.
Use regulated battery support throughout immobiliser programming.

golf_mk4_1998_2004_keyed: Split Immo2 and Immo3 once the exact cluster is identified.
Verify early-build transponder type before generating a replacement key.
golf_mk5_2004_2009_keyed: VDO, Micronas and other cluster implementations may require different data routes.
Record cluster part number and manufacturer in future verified sub-records.
golf_mk6_2009_2013_keyed: Challenge and later trade-labelled families must not be merged without module evidence.
AKL acceptance should follow dashboard identification.
golf_mk7_2013_2017: MQB dashboard family determines the supported data-read route.
KESSY specification changes the module and key workflow.
OBDSTAR officially lists MQB48-5A AKL support using the RH850/V850 Adapter Kit, with exact dashboard and processor identification still required.

OBDSTAR March 2026 coverage explicitly adds D70F3525-V5 key programming with C4-06 and online synchronisation-code calculation. This evidence applies only to that dashboard variant, not every Golf Mk7 cluster.
golf_mk75_2017_2020: Do not assume identical coverage to early Mk7.
Confirm exact dashboard and current software coverage before AKL.
Keep MQB48-5A/5B and MQB49-5C records separate. OBDSTAR's current RH850/V850 adapter documentation states 5C is not supported by that adapter route.
golf_mk8_2020_present: Check current aftermarket and authorised online coverage before booking.
Confirm key part number or original key and VIN before ordering or generating hardware.

official_evidence.source: OBDSTAR RH850/V850 Adapter Kit product documentation
official_evidence.scope: MQB48-5A/5B dashboard data reading and adapter identification
MQB48-5A D70F3525-V5 Program Keys, AKL, C4-06 and online synchronisation calculation
MQB48-5A AKL with RH850/V850 Adapter Kit and IMMO IV NEC24C64/NEC24C32 bench reading with VW4-AKL cable

research_gaps: Verified UK cluster-manufacturer splits by generation and build range
Exact UK key and blade transitions by part number
Model-specific mapping of official tool coverage to exact dashboard part numbers
Approved module-location photographs and adapter photographs
